from pathlib import Path
from core.context_builder import ContextBuilder
from core.memory_store import MemoryStore
from core.session import Session

# 初始化
ws = Path\('./workspace'\)
ws.mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)
mem = MemoryStore\(ws\)
cb = ContextBuilder\(ws, mem\)

# 1. 测试 _get_identity
identity = cb._get_identity\(\)
print\('=== Identity ==='\)
print\(identity[:200]\)
print\('...'\)

# 2. 测试 _load_bootstrap_files（无文件时应返回空）
bootstrap = cb._load_bootstrap_files\(\)
print\(f'\\n=== Bootstrap \(should be empty\): [{bootstrap}]'\)

# 3. 测试 build_system_prompt
sp = cb.build_system_prompt\('你是一个智能助手'\)
print\(f'\\n=== System Prompt 片段 ==='\)
print\(sp[:300]\)
print\('...'\)

# 4. 测试 _build_runtime_context
rc = cb._build_runtime_context\(channel='cli', chat_id='direct'\)
print\(f'\\n=== Runtime Context ==='\)
print\(rc\)

# 5. 测试 _build_user_content（纯文本）
uc = cb._build_user_content\('hello', None\)
print\(f'\\n=== User Content \(text\): {uc}'\)

# 6. 测试 build_messages
session = Session\(key='cli:direct'\)
session.add_message\('user', 'hello'\)
session.add_message\('assistant', 'hi there'\)
msgs = cb.build_messages\(session, '你是一个智能助手', channel='cli', chat_id='direct'\)
print\(f'\\n=== Message count: {len\(msgs\)} ==='\)
for m in msgs:
    role = m['role']
    content = str\(m.get\('content', ''\)\)[:80]
    print\(f'  [{role}] {content}...'\)

# 7. 测试 add_assistant_message / add_tool_result
test_msgs = []
cb.add_assistant_message\(test_msgs, 'thinking...', tool_calls=[{'id': 'tc1'}]\)
cb.add_tool_result\(test_msgs, 'tc1', 'read_file', 'file content'\)
print\(f'\\n=== Helper methods: {len\(test_msgs\)} messages added ==='\)

print\('\\nAll tests passed!'\)
" 2>&1)
